accomplishments.description: Deployed streaming ingestion pipeline to staging with Kafka connector support
Reduced P95 query latency from 420ms to 185ms on partitioned datasets
Completed schema registry migration — 47 schemas validated and promoted
Merged RBAC middleware with row-level security enforcement for multi-tenant access

blockers.description: AWS quota limit on r6g.2xlarge instances blocking staging scale test — support ticket open since February 27
Third-party CDC connector drops events under sustained 50K msg/s throughput — vendor investigating

next_week.description: Run full-scale ingestion benchmark with 200M row synthetic dataset
Implement dead-letter queue alerting and replay mechanism
Draft schema governance policy document for architecture review
Begin integration testing of RBAC with customer-facing API gateway
